{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323151923D773533F09283F93D954"}"},"total":850},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7195912882167907130","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了，作者大大加油啊！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1675429114,"group_id":"7187816934145002551","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9aK5nkaUM/6op4Y7WyZxZ06RY/4XQo1aKemNC/sUru5","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ce55c4437cf742a2b4ad64a5f58d70bf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787250&x-signature=TQsuQ7w1262nC2CxZDe1F8myCcw%3D","user_id":"2559280194521598","user_name":"耽染柒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2559280194521598","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7187816934145002551","book_info":{"abstract":"司徒礼重生到了战乱年代，他食不果腹，只是一个小小的车夫，他知晓如何生存，却毫无渠道。
他本以为自己一身将会继续碌碌无为，却不成想，竟然阴差阳错之下，救了军统的大佬。
老板：“一个月内从军校毕业，我给你官做。”
还没等司徒礼反驳，他就已经出现在了军校当中。
接着，他发现这个世界居然汇聚了六哥郑耀先，四哥徐百川，蝴蝶顾晓梦，毒蛇明楼，毒蜂王天风。
在了解到这个世界后，他还觉醒了特工选择系统。
【叮！】
【汪曼春遇险，选择营救还是视而不见？】
【选择营救可获得汪曼春得好感。】
【选择视而不见可获得身份伪造，伪造对象，张离，可长期获取七十六号以及南田洋子的情报。】
【叮！】
【郑耀先任务失败，选择接手还是落进下石？】
【选择接手，可获得庄园一栋。】
【选择落进下石，可成为老板得左膀右臂之一】
自此，一个淞沪站军统站长成为了特高课，七十六号的噩梦。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8f77aa3d032e1fd3c7a3be7d198ba325","author":"一曲赋江山","author_id":"","book_id":"7187816934145002551","book_name":"谍战：三面特工，和明楼接头开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":504,"name":"抗战谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504&name=抗战谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7187989829441815043","read_count":"11591","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"444408"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"222","tags":"抗战谍战,系统,重生,都市","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3efd0462f83d143a7d392b769201d11f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434363&x-signature=N%2Fm%2B1KbnfGNuZfyp0cUIQNlhe4Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1939180710276279","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.60078e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323151923D773533F09283F93D954"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":41,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4600,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":27847},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1675531355,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":
